reviews.review_description: I used to play other games with slow motion and stuff like that but now that I found this I keep playing this every day it’s addictive

I've been trying to find a mecha piloting game for a low price, then I stumbled onto this jewel. It may have some slight issues, but the rest of the game makes up to it. I mean, a free game in early access? It's not going to be perfect, (devs still where cooking on this tho 👍👍👍) but I still think with some elbow grease and a couple hours of work this thing could be as good, or even better than some of the games on the meta store for 5-15 pounds!

Keep going,
Jam
Ps. Why is there a review about fishing?

This is a VERY raw demo. The graphics are good in some respects, but that's about where the accolades stop. Animations are poor, the inertia of the gun is far too great in magnitude, and the turret doesn't pivot up or down. The gun fires, and then stops firing randomly, without any visual gauge of how much ammunition remains.

With a lot of love, this could be a great wave shooter.

l i n k t r . e e / q u a c k b i r t h
The concept is interesting, and the game's graphics are excellent; however, the control system for moving left, right, aiming, and shooting is not good.

developer_response.body: Thanks! We are still in early access and experimenting with the controls. Just released a new version for you guys to check out!

reviews.review_description: Crashland if the controls had been designed by a mad blind sadistic cucumber.

developer_response.body: Ouch, this is only partially true - I'm not mad, I'm just disappointed. Anyway, we are still experimenting with the controls and just released an update if you want to check it out 🥒🙃

reviews.review_description: I like the concept. Waiting for next updates
A good start, I spent a few good hours in the game already and it doesn't get old.
